info.title: Notifications
info.description: Notifications management API for subscribing, listing and creating CRM notification channels.

get.description: Get a list of all active notification channels for the user.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the list of notification channels.

schema.description: A wrapper for the list of notification channels and pagination information.

notify_on_related_action.description: Whether to notify on related associated record actions.

return_affected_field_values.description: Whether to return affected field values in notification payloads.

fields.description: Fields to include in the notification.

token.description: Verification token for the notification channel.

info.description: Information about the pagination and record count.

more_records.description: Indicates if more records are available.

post.description: Create one or more notification channels.

put.description: Replace all details of an existing notification channel, overwriting its previous configuration.

schema.description: Full details update request wrapper (replaces existing).

notify_on_related_action.description: Notify on related associated record actions.

return_affected_field_values.description: Return affected field values in notification payloads.

patch.description: Partially update selected properties of a notification channel (URL, events, expiry, conditions, token).

schema.description: Update specific notification info request wrapper.

return_affected_field_values.description: Return affected field values in notification payloads.

delete.description: Disable one or more notification channels identified by the channel_ids query parameter.

MultiStatus.description: Partial success in creating notification channels.

watch.description: List of create result entries (success and failure).

ErrorDetails.description: Specific details about the error, often including which parameter or value caused the issue.

api_name.description: The API name of the parameter or field related to the error.

expected_data_type.description: The expected data type for a parameter or field.

json_path.description: The JSON path indicating the location of the error in the request payload.

ambiguity_due_to.description: List of fields causing ambiguity during processing.

api_name.description: The API name of the ambiguous field.

json_path.description: The JSON path indicating the location of the ambiguous field.

expected_fields.description: List of expected fields when multiple fields are required.

api_name.description: The API name of the expected field.

json_path.description: The JSON path indicating the location of the expected field.

dependee.description: Details of the dependee field that is missing.

api_name.description: The API name of the dependee field.

json_path.description: The JSON path indicating the location of the dependee field.

supported_values.description: List of supported values for a parameter or field.

maximum_length.description: The maximum allowed length for a parameter or field.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response structure containing error code, message, and optional details

status.description: Status indicator for the response, always 'error' for error responses
